step.name: discover_all_tables
step.description: Get list of all tables in database

step.name: collect_table_statistics
step.description: Gather row counts and basic stats for all tables

nodes.error:
failed to execute step "collect_table_statistics": exit status 5
recent stderr (tail):
jq: parse error: Unmatched '}' at line 5, column 1

outputVariables.STATS_FILE_PATH: STATS_FILE_PATH=Collecting statistics at Wed Feb  4 06:00:00 UTC 2026

step.name: check_critical_tables
step.description: Run quality checks on business-critical tables

step.name: analyze_quality_trends
step.description: Compare current metrics with historical data
step.script:
echo "=== Quality Trend Analysis ===" > /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt
echo "Analysis Time: $(date)" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt
echo "" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt

# Count stats files (history)
HISTORY_COUNT=$(ls -1 /var/lib/dagu/data/table_stats_*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Historical Data Points: ${HISTORY_COUNT}" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt
echo "" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt

# Current check results
echo "Current Quality Status:" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt
echo "${CRITICAL_CHECKS}" | jq '.statistics' >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt
echo "" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt

# Table counts
TABLE_COUNT=$(echo "${ALL_TABLES}" | jq '.total_tables')
echo "Total Tables Monitored: ${TABLE_COUNT}" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt

cat /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_trends_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).txt

step.name: generate_dashboard_data
step.description: Prepare data for quality dashboard visualization

step.name: alert_if_degraded
step.description: Check if quality has degraded and send alerts
step.script:
FAILED_COUNT=$(echo "${CRITICAL_CHECKS}" | jq '.statistics.failed')

if [ "${FAILED_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "⚠️ WARNING: ${FAILED_COUNT} quality checks failed!"
  echo "Review details at: http://localhost:8080"
  exit 1
else
  echo "✅ All quality checks passing"
  exit 0
fi

step.name: onFailure
step.script:
echo "$(date): Quality degradation detected" >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_alerts.log
echo "Failed checks: ${CRITICAL_CHECKS}" | jq '.results[] | select(.success == false)' >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_alerts.log

onFailure.error:
exit status 5
recent stderr (tail):
jq: parse error: Invalid numeric literal at line 1, column 7
